---
title: "Methodological triangulation: g-computation, IPW, and matching"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Methodological triangulation}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

<!-- TODO: write triangulation vignette -->
<!-- Goal: compare gcomp (~3.5 kg), IPW (~3.4 kg), matching on NHEFS -->
<!-- Cover: diagnose(), Love plots, when methods agree/disagree -->
